description: Due to a new state law, HR needs to update the company's paid sick leave policy in the employee handbook.

nodes.task_description: Draft the new policy language in consultation with the legal department.

expected_outcome.value: HR drafts legally compliant language for the new policy.

nodes.task_description: Update the employee handbook document with the new policy language.

expected_outcome.value: HR successfully edits the handbook document.

nodes.task_description: Publish the updated handbook on the company intranet and send a notification to all employees about the change.

expected_outcome.value: HR makes the new handbook available and communicates the update to all staff.
